CustomField.description: True when this code is Active AND the current time falls within its effective window. Null start/end dates are treated as "no bound on that side." Used by list views, reports, and convenience checks.
CustomField.formula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Active"), OR(ISBLANK(Effective_Start_Date__c), NOW() >= Effective_Start_Date__c), OR(ISBLANK(Effective_End_Date__c), NOW() <= Effective_End_Date__c) )
CustomField.label: Is Currently Usable
